scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --kill-others-on-fail --names "fastf1,server,client" --prefix-colors "yellow,red,cyan" "/Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.12/bin/python3 -m uvicorn fastf1-service.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8100 --reload" "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.dev:mock: concurrently --kill-others --kill-others-on-fail --names "mock-f1,server,client" --prefix-colors "magenta,red,cyan" "npx tsx server/scripts/mock-fastf1.ts" "FASTF1_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8199 npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
